decks.notes: This Izzet Control deck focuses on using a mix of burn spells, counterspells, and card draw to control the board and disrupt the opponent's strategy. It also utilizes creatures like Hearth Elemental and Eddymurk Crab to apply pressure and protect your life total. Riverpyre Verge and Multiversal Passage help fix mana and ensure you have the right colors when needed. Winternight Stories and Sunderflock serve as versatile removal options, while Prismari Charm provides flexibility with card draw, removal, or buffing your creatures. Impractical Joke offers a surprise element to throw off your opponent's plans.

The deck utilizes a combination of removal spells, card draw, and control cards to slow down the opponent's game plan and maintain board control. By using cards like Jeskai Revelation and Stock Up to draw cards and Broadside Barrage and Firebending Lesson to remove threats, the deck aims to outvalue opponents and win the game with powerful late-game spells. Additionally, cards like Consult the Star Charts and Tablet of Discovery help to filter through the deck to find the necessary answers when needed. Overall, the deck focuses on disrupting the opponent and overwhelming them with card advantage.

The main focus of this Izzet Control deck is to utilize a combination of spells and creatures to control the board and out-value the opponent. The deck includes a mix of removal spells, card draw, and powerful creatures like Colorstorm Stallion and Molten-Core Maestro. By efficiently managing resources and using cards like Prismari Charm and Sanar, Unfinished Genius, the deck aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan while building towards a strong late-game advantage. Patience and strategic decision-making are key to piloting this control deck to victory.

The focus of this deck is to quickly build up a board presence with efficient and aggressive creatures, incorporating blue and white cards to control and disrupt the opponent's plays. Aang, Swift Savior serves as a strong early game threat, supported by cards like Aven Interrupter and Floodpits Drowner to maintain pressure. Quantum Riddler and Spell Snare offer disruption and protection, while Avatar's Wrath provides a finisher. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of speed, power, and control in order to secure victory.

This deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with quick and aggressive plays, focusing on tempo and resource denial through bounce effects and counter spells. It also includes efficient creatures with evasion to chip away at the opponent's life total. With a mix of burn spells and card draw, the deck can maintain pressure while controlling the board. The inclusion of multicolor lands and spells adds flexibility and diversity to the overall strategy, allowing for adaptability in different matchups.

The main concept of the deck revolves around utilizing control elements, such as countering spells and removing threats, while also incorporating Izzet themed cards that focus on card draw and spell synergy. The deck aims to establish board presence and control the game through a mix of removal spells, card advantage, and efficient creatures. Additionally, the deck includes cards that allow for flexibility and adaptation to different situations, ultimately aiming to outvalue the opponent and maintain dominance over the game state.

The primary focus of this deck is to quickly fill up the graveyard with powerful creatures and then bring them back into play using reanimation spells. By utilizing various spells and abilities to fuel this strategy, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of high-impact creatures and disruptive spells. The deck also includes cards that provide card advantage and protection, allowing for consistency and resilience against opposing strategies. Additionally, the deck incorporates a mix of removal and disruption to control the board and maintain tempo throughout the game.

This Sultai Control deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's strategy while maintaining card advantage. It utilizes a variety of removal spells, counterspells, and card draw effects to control the game. The deck also includes some land cards that provide additional value, such as Great Hall of the Biblioplex and Gloomlake Verge. The goal is to slow down the opponent's game plan, ultimately outvaluing them in the late game with powerful spells like Rakshasa's Bargain and Mind into Matter. The deck aims to dominate the board and control the game until it can secure a victory.

The main strategy of this Selesnya Aggro deck is to quickly build up a board presence with efficient creatures like Llanowar Elves and Badgermole Cub, while also utilizing cards like Mightform Harmonizer and Earthbender Ascension to boost their power. Erode and Sazh's Chocobo provide removal options, while Dyadrine, Synthesis Amalgam and Mossborn Hydra offer versatility and resilience. The deck aims to overwhelm opponents with a mixture of creature aggression and spell disruption, ultimately securing victory through a combination of early aggression and mid-game power spikes.

This deck focuses on quickly building a strong board presence with low-cost creatures like Badgermole Cub and Llanowar Elves, supported by cards like Earthbender Ascension and Mightform Harmonizer to pump up your creatures. The addition of Sazh's Chocobo and Demolition Field provide additional removal options to clear the way for your attacks. The inclusion of Ba Sing Se and Escape Tunnel help protect your creatures and keep the pressure on your opponent. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm your opponent with fast, aggressive plays while maintaining board control.

The deck focuses on using a combination of counterspells, burn spells, and card draw to control the game and disrupt the opponent's strategy. By efficiently managing resources and using cards like Hearth Elemental and Riverpyre Verge as win conditions, the deck aims to outmaneuver and outlast the opponent until victory is achieved. Multiversal Passage and Sunderflock provide additional flexibility and removal options, while Prismari Charm and Traumatic Critique offer versatile answers to various threats. Overall, the deck prioritizes tempo, card advantage, and disruption to secure a favorable position and secure the win.

The main focus of this Jeskai Control deck is to control the board through a combination of counter spells, removal, and card advantage. The deck aims to stall the game with efficient removal spells like Pyroclasm and Abrade, while generating card advantage with Consult the Star Charts and Jeskai Revelation. Flashback and Stock Up provide additional resources for the player to use, while cards like Impractical Joke and Into the Flood Maw disrupt the opponent's strategy. Overall, the deck's strategy is to outvalue the opponent through card advantage and efficient removal spells.

This Mardu Aggro deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with a mix of aggressive creatures and burn spells. By utilizing a combination of low-cost creatures like Bloodghast and Marauding Mako, along with efficient removal spells such as Burst Lightning and Practiced Offense, the deck aims to maintain a strong presence on the board while dealing direct damage to the opponent. Additionally, cards like Hardened Academic and Tersa Lightshatter provide synergy and card advantage to keep the pressure on the opponent and secure a quick victory.

The deck focuses on utilizing control spells and card advantage to outvalue the opponent. By using removal spells, counterspells, and card draw, the deck aims to control the board and outlast the opponent until it can win the game with powerful late-game spells like Jeskai Revelation. With a mix of burn spells, counterspells, and card draw, the deck is versatile in handling various threats and generating card advantage. The deck also includes a land subtheme for additional value and consistency.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly build a powerful board presence with efficient creatures and utilize land-based ramp strategies to accelerate your game plan. By utilizing cards like Earthbender Ascension and Fabled Passage, you can quickly swarm the battlefield and overwhelm your opponent with aggressive creatures like Badgermole Cub and Sazh's Chocobo. Additionally, the inclusion of Escape Tunnel and Hushwood Verge provides extra utility and flexibility in your land base. This deck aims to apply pressure early and maintain a strong board presence to secure a victory.

This Selesnya Aggro deck focuses on quickly building up a board of powerful creatures and using them to overwhelm the opponent. By utilizing cards like Ba Sing Se, Llanowar Elves, and Sazh's Chocobo to ramp up your mana and play high-impact threats like Mossborn Hydra and Earthbender Ascension, you can quickly close out games before your opponent has a chance to stabilize. With a mix of creature buffs and removal spells like Erode, this deck aims to be fast, aggressive, and relentless in its pursuit of victory.
